User.title: User
User.description: Core user account profile linked to sync functionality.

Preference.title: Preference
Preference.description: User customizable keyboard styles, custom layout preference, active font, and offline-sync items.

History.title: History
History.description: Cross-platform keyboard input history, including styled text copies and generated stickers.

users/{userId}.description: Stores core details for synchronized users.

preferences/{userId}.description: Stores synchronized keyboard aesthetics, settings, and favorites.

history/{historyId}.description: Stores syncable user activity log, sticker downloads, and design logs.
